title: Unit 1 – G1: going-to future
description: Bilde das going-to future: Ergänze am/is/are oder isn't/aren't in den Lücken

items.question: I ___ going to visit my friend.
She ___ going to watch a movie.
They ___ going to play football.
He ___ going to practice for the race.
We ___ going to go to the mall.
You ___ going to meet their daughter.
Mom's friends ___ going to visit with their daughter.
Emily ___ going to practice for the barrel race. (Verneinung)
They ___ going to visit this week. (Verneinung)
He ___ going to be at school today. (Verneinung)
___ you going to the movie theater? (Frage)
___ she going to come to the party? (Frage)
___ I going to need a ticket? (Frage)
___ they going to practice today? (Frage)
We're going to ___ Minneapolis next week. (besuchen)
I'm going to ___ my brother at the station. (treffen)
going-to future: Hilfsverb für 'I'
going-to future: Hilfsverb für 'she/he/it'
going-to future: Hilfsverb für 'we/you/they'
going-to future Verneinung: she → ___
going-to future Verneinung: they → ___
